markdownRemark.html:
Nvidia did not just build faster chips; they built the CUDA software ecosystem that locked developers into their architecture.

By prioritizing developer tooling alongside silicon advancements, they created an insurmountable moat in the AI infrastructure space.

This is a test post to verify the Gatsby routing architecture.

frontmatter.title: The Nvidia Market Strategy: Analyzing the Infrastructure of the AI Boom
frontmatter.description: A deep dive into how Nvidia positioned itself as the foundational hardware monopoly for global artificial intelligence scaling.
